title: Validation set manifest
$comment: Base schema for a curated selection of observational data used to validate simulation outputs. Domain-specific observable vocabularies (unit enums, domain tags) are defined in application-repo extension schemas.

domain.description: Domain tags. Values are application-defined; the base schema imposes no enum.

upstream_catalogs.description: IDs of the upstream catalog manifests this validation set draws from.

unit.description: Unit for this observable. Application repos define their own unit vocabulary.

build_plan.$comment: Planning record for how this validation set will be built. Not artifact provenance — provenance lives in sidecar YAML records written by adapters.

planned_from.description: Repository-relative paths to catalog manifests this validation set is built from.

requires_rebuild.description: True when the artifact does not yet exist or is out of date.
